title: Water Bucket Oxidization
description: Craft copper blocks with a water bucket to instantly oxidize them! No more waiting for your Davids to age!
body:
This datapack allows you to craft a water bucket with 1-8 of:

(1.20.1 and newer)
- Copper Blocks
- Cut Copper
- Cut Copper Slabs
- Cut Copper Stairs
  
(1.21 and newer)
- Copper Doors
- Copper Trapdoors
- Copper Bulbs
- Chiseled Copper
- Copper Grates
  
(1.21.9 and newer)
- Copper Chests
- Copper Golem Statues
- Copper Lanterns
- Copper Chains
- Copper Bars
- Lightning Rods
  
To immediately oxidize them!
